title: OrchardFullViewingKey::address_at truncates diversifier index to u32
description: OrchardFullViewingKey::address_at(j: u32) silently limits Orchard address derivation to the first ~4 billion diversifier indices (u32::MAX = 2^32-1), while Sapling uses u128 (88-bit space = 2^88-1). The internal address_at_index(DiversifierIndex) method is correct but is pub(crate). If diversified_address() in unified.rs were to call address_at() instead of address_at_index(), indices above u32::MAX would silently wrap. The public API mismatch is a latent bug risk — callers expecting 88-bit diversity cannot use the public method.
